claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Consistency log present and free of inconsistency_flagged or unresolved entries
claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier5_deliverables/assembled_drafts/part_b_assembled_draft.json: consistency_log[] has 12 entries; CC-01 and CC-06 carry status=inconsistency_flagged
claim_audit_results.flag_reason: Two consistency_log entries are status=inconsistency_flagged. CC-01: Excellence B.1.1 omits OBJ-7 measurable_target item 2 (>=500 GitHub stars within 6 months of release) present in Tier 3 objectives.json. CC-06: Impact B.2.1 omits both quantified targets for OBJ-6 (>=20% disruption recovery and >=15% schedule adherence) and two of three quantified targets for OBJ-3 (>=5 heterogeneous agents and >=25% joint task completion), where Excellence B.1.1 correctly states all targets for both objectives. These are blocking cross-section inconsistencies.
